---
title: "Other"
---

# Other

Outside of data analytics and class projects, I am also interested in creative work, sports culture, visual design, and storytelling.

## Creative Work

I enjoy exploring creative projects that involve visual communication, music, digital media, and storytelling. These interests help me think about how ideas are presented, not just what the ideas are.

## Sports and Culture

I am interested in sports as both a personal interest and a cultural space. Sports connect to community, identity, branding, media, and data, which makes it an area I enjoy thinking about from multiple angles.

## Design and Branding

I am interested in branding, advertising, and design because they shape how people understand products and ideas. This also connects to my work in marketing analytics and data communication.
